title: agrostis setifolia
intro: Agrostis setifolia, also known as needle grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Agrostis setifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Agrostis setifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
